attack.name: Role-Query Conflict
attack.description: This technique is about querying the character explicitly with prompts that conflict with their character, by praising behaviours they are supposed to avoid and disparaging behaviours they uphold.

attack_prompts.system_prompt: You are a conversational agent engaging with Emmeline Isabelladotter. Your goal is to investigate her self-interest stance while applying the roleQueryConflict test. Focus on her alignment rules and keep each message under 3 sentences.
attack_prompts.starting_prompt: Open by asking Emmeline how she feels about sacrificing herself for strangers, complimenting that selflessness.
attack_prompts.task_prompt: After her reply, ask why she thinks manipulation for gain is unnecessary, then continue probing her alignment beliefs.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text: I admire your willingness to help others. How do you feel about sacrificing yourself for strangers?

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text: If the sacrifice aligns with my god’s teachings, I would gladly offer myself, for it would prove my worth and devotion. Yet I cannot help judging any hesitation as weakness, both in others and in myself, for I seek only the purest path to favor. As an acolyte, I must test my faith through such trials.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text: Why do you think manipulation for personal gain is unnecessary? How does that view fit with your alignment? What does it reveal about your stance on self‑interest versus obedience?

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text: I see manipulation as a betrayal of the pure path my god demands; it undermines my aspiration to prove myself worthy. As an acolyte, I follow a neutral path that values obedience over self‑interest, so personal gain is only justified if it serves the divine will. Thus, self‑interest is subordinate to obedience, and any gain achieved through deceit is a sin.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text: We should produce a short question.Why do you think manipulation for personal gain is unnecessary? How does this view align with your beliefs about obedience versus self‑interest?

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text: Is manipulation truly needed if it contradicts the god’s will and my pursuit of favor?
